version-ahead manifest still inverts to a usable index incl. mappedFrom fold provenance (fail-soft, no throw, not unavailable-due-to-version) [round-trip boundary probe]

behaviors.behavior: guard changes no existing return value for any prior input (corrupt/missing/truncated/real-repo unchanged)
behaviors.evidence: full server suite green (235 files, 2794 passed, 1 skipped) incl. traceability.test.ts real-repo calibration probe

surface_verification.justification: Server-internal observability only: readTraceabilityIndex now emits a fail-soft console.warn when the manifest schema_version is ahead of TRACEABILITY_SCHEMA_VERSION; the TraceabilityIndex return contract is byte-identical for every input, so there is no UI-observable delta and no browser surface to exercise. The touches_io_boundary enforcement is met by a round-trip boundary probe (a version-ahead manifest still inverts to a valid index) in traceability.schema-version.test.ts, and the full server suite (2794 passed) exercises the mission-context consumer chain (resolver -> routes) confirming unchanged output.
